economic_notes: South Beach Casino Limited Partnership and Pauingassi First Nation Construction Inc. accounted for using modified equity method. $1,000,000 casino income distribution received during the year. Gas Bar & Store operated as consolidated entity.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Six entities fully consolidated including Operating Fund, Housing Authority, Care Home, Educational Authority Inc., Health Authority, and Gas Bar & Store. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: South Beach Casino Limited Partnership and Pauingassi First Nation Construction Inc. $1,000,000 South Beach Casino income distribution received. No schedule of remuneration provided. Province is Manitoba. Expenses_housing mapped to Capital and Housing segment; expenses_infrastructure mapped to Operations and Maintenance segment; expenses_enterprises mapped to Band Funds segment.
